current.positioning: Specular AI uses AI to automatically find and fix security vulnerabilities in application code, reducing manual security review burden for engineering teams.

39f2d5db-69ca-47c0-9bb7-90176d48f65d.name: Semgrep
39f2d5db-69ca-47c0-9bb7-90176d48f65d.product_positioning: Buyers evaluate Semgrep for customizable static analysis rules and OSS-friendly pricing alongside AI-assisted remediation

724eb3ee-89c1-4bc6-8d93-9df1782fbfe0.name: GitHub Advanced Security (CodeQL)
724eb3ee-89c1-4bc6-8d93-9df1782fbfe0.product_positioning: GitHub-native teams compare CodeQL for deep semantic analysis and Copilot Autofix for AI-generated remediation within the same workflow

a7812643-efa3-49e7-909a-544f854672c4.name: Snyk
a7812643-efa3-49e7-909a-544f854672c4.product_positioning: Developers compare Snyk for its broad language support, IDE integrations, and fix suggestions for code and dependency vulnerabilities

b47598d4-612f-44e4-965c-17ca1fa1c13d.name: Aikido Security
b47598d4-612f-44e4-965c-17ca1fa1c13d.product_positioning: SMB and mid-market teams compare Aikido for consolidated SAST, SCA, secret scanning, and cloud posture in one platform

bbe7c1c9-d8aa-4fc1-8e8a-493fd507e4bf.name: Socket Security
bbe7c1c9-d8aa-4fc1-8e8a-493fd507e4bf.product_positioning: Teams concerned with open-source risk compare Socket for real-time malicious package detection and supply-chain attack prevention

evidence.snippet: As of early 2026, GitHub Advanced Security's mindshare in the Application Security Tools category fell to 4.3%, down from 7.8% the prior year. Users cite lack of a centralized cross-project dashboard, difficult deployment, and high per-committer costs as top complaints.
evidence.title: GitHub Advanced Security mindshare drops from 7.8% to 4.3% as pricing restructure draws criticism

1facc699-d71c-466f-a552-46fb2d7e7d17.headline: GitHub Advanced Security mindshare drops from 7.8% to 4.3% as pricing restructure draws criticism
1facc699-d71c-466f-a552-46fb2d7e7d17.pain_hypothesis: buyers are likely under pressure to justify renewal cost and compare lower-friction alternatives.
1facc699-d71c-466f-a552-46fb2d7e7d17.recommended_angle: Offer a cost-neutral pilot and renewal benchmark.

evidence.snippet: In February 2026, Codacy publicly announced it was replacing Semgrep with Opengrep across its platform, citing the preservation of open-source capabilities removed by Semgrep Inc., while maintaining full rule and configuration compatibility for existing users.
evidence.title: Codacy migrates from Semgrep to Opengrep as 1:1 replacement

5bd4f23e-dc91-4c71-acab-272fb2d5b728.headline: Codacy migrates from Semgrep to Opengrep as 1:1 replacement
5bd4f23e-dc91-4c71-acab-272fb2d5b728.pain_hypothesis: customers may worry about roadmap continuity and account support stability.
5bd4f23e-dc91-4c71-acab-272fb2d5b728.recommended_angle: Offer roadmap certainty and executive-alignment messaging.

evidence.snippet: Snyk CEO Peter McKay stepped down, stating the next chapter requires a 'visionary, AI-immersed leader.' Founder Guy Podjarny had also already exited, signaling instability at the top amid a competitive AI-security market.
evidence.title: Snyk CEO steps down, citing need for AI-immersed leadership

750c11e3-d680-4700-8be6-58dcbf3803a8.headline: Snyk CEO steps down, citing need for AI-immersed leadership
750c11e3-d680-4700-8be6-58dcbf3803a8.pain_hypothesis: customers may worry about roadmap continuity and account support stability.
750c11e3-d680-4700-8be6-58dcbf3803a8.recommended_angle: Offer roadmap certainty and executive-alignment messaging.

evidence.snippet: In January 2025, a consortium of appsec companies (Aikido, Endor Labs, Jit, Orca Security, and others) forked Semgrep CE after Semgrep Inc. moved cross-function taint analysis and other critical features behind its commercial platform, triggering widespread community backlash over the December 2024 license change.
evidence.title: Security rivals fork Semgrep OSS into 'Opengrep' after feature lockdown behind commercial license

a6e894d1-c43c-4bf3-81d3-7f5dc1668732.headline: Security rivals fork Semgrep OSS into 'Opengrep' after feature lockdown behind commercial license
a6e894d1-c43c-4bf3-81d3-7f5dc1668732.pain_hypothesis: customers may worry about roadmap continuity and account support stability.
a6e894d1-c43c-4bf3-81d3-7f5dc1668732.recommended_angle: Offer roadmap certainty and executive-alignment messaging.

evidence.snippet: On February 2, 2026, GitHub Actions, CodeQL, Dependabot, and Codespaces were unavailable for ~3h45m due to hosted runner failures during the platform's ongoing Azure datacenter migration, which has been a source of recurring instability since October 2025.
evidence.title: February 2026 GitHub outage takes down CodeQL, Dependabot, and Copilot for nearly 4 hours

b0d02c5e-9f54-44ce-9f6b-38c58cee33bc.headline: February 2026 GitHub outage takes down CodeQL, Dependabot, and Copilot for nearly 4 hours
b0d02c5e-9f54-44ce-9f6b-38c58cee33bc.pain_hypothesis: operators may be questioning reliability, contingency plans, and vendor accountability.
b0d02c5e-9f54-44ce-9f6b-38c58cee33bc.recommended_angle: Offer a resilience comparison and migration risk review.

evidence.snippet: G2 reviewers note the entry-level paid tier (~$250-350/mo) is a barrier for smaller teams, with some users flagging the cost as disproportionate relative to competitors offering similar SAST/SCA coverage at lower price points.
evidence.title: Aikido Security Reviews 2026 — Pricing Concerns for Smaller Teams

c9f66ee1-8ba6-495b-b79b-c6bfe498a2fa.headline: Aikido Security Reviews 2026 — Pricing Concerns for Smaller Teams
c9f66ee1-8ba6-495b-b79b-c6bfe498a2fa.pain_hypothesis: buyers are likely under pressure to justify renewal cost and compare lower-friction alternatives.
c9f66ee1-8ba6-495b-b79b-c6bfe498a2fa.recommended_angle: Offer a cost-neutral pilot and renewal benchmark.

evidence.snippet: Snyk conducted its fourth round of layoffs in three years in July 2025, with employees citing poor handling of severance and missed unemployment claim deadlines, fueling negative Glassdoor sentiment.
evidence.title: Cyber startup Snyk undergoes fresh wave of job cuts

ec37cb1a-9ced-4169-a006-028c5a2a67c7.headline: Cyber startup Snyk undergoes fresh wave of job cuts
ec37cb1a-9ced-4169-a006-028c5a2a67c7.pain_hypothesis: champions may be losing internal confidence because peers are surfacing similar complaints.
ec37cb1a-9ced-4169-a006-028c5a2a67c7.recommended_angle: Offer a peer-backed alternative workflow audit.

evidence.snippet: Aikido Security acquired both Allseek and Haicker in September 2025 to automate penetration testing, signaling a platform expansion that may introduce integration friction and pricing changes for existing customers focused on ASPM.
evidence.title: Aikido Security Acquires Allseek and Haicker, Expanding Platform Scope

f1b8cfab-33ce-4d25-94a5-e30c8eb04b03.headline: Aikido Security Acquires Allseek and Haicker, Expanding Platform Scope
